questionHtml:
Two identical sources oscillate in phase and produce constructive interference at a point P. The intensity recorded at P is I.

What is the intensity at P from one source?


A.  2I
B.  I

C.  I2

D.  I4

meta.title: Two identical sources oscillate in phase and produce constructive interference at a point P. The intensity recorded at P is I. What is the intensity at P from one source? A. 2IB. I
